_comment: ReActor direct face swap: put the face from 'face' onto the picture in 'target'. No diffusion pass — fast, exact, best on photoreal targets. Needs the ComfyUI-ReActor node pack (Gourieff) + inswapper_128.onnx in models/insightface + GFPGANv1.4.pth in models/facerestore_models (see docs/MODELS.md). Detection (the 'outline/mask' step) runs on CPU via onnxruntime — that is normal. byrdimage.faceswap() fills the LoadImage names, restore model and filename prefix at submit time.
